name: test-first
description: Write failing tests first, then implement until they pass. Prevents writing code that 'looks right' but doesn't actually work.
steps: Read the target description and identify concrete acceptance criteria
Write a minimal failing test that captures the core requirement
Run the test to confirm it fails for the right reason
Implement the smallest change that makes the test pass
Run all tests to ensure nothing is broken
Refactor if needed while keeping tests green
